about.title: About
about.subTitle: me
about.desc: a junior web developer with a strong interest in creating engaging and interactive web experiences. I'm currently based in Geislingen, Germany and eager to learn and grow within the web development field. My skills include JavaScript, React, and a focus on building user-centered interfaces.

services.ser1Desc: I build high-performance Single Page Applications using React’s component-based architecture, ensuring modularity, reusability, and long-term maintainability.
services.ser2Desc: I implement robust data flows using Redux (Toolkit), managing complex application states efficiently to ensure predictability and seamless user interactions.
services.ser3Desc: I transform designs into pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces that work flawlessly across all devices, focusing on modern CSS, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility.
services.ser4Desc: I integrate RESTful APIs to connect front-end interfaces with back-end services, optimizing data fetching and handling asynchronous logic for dynamic content.

resume.title: My
resume.subTitle: Resume
resume.resume1desc: I am currently actively engaged in self-directed learning, focusing on enhancing my frontend development skills. I am building and deploying React.js projects, leveraging technologies like JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and libraries such as Redux. These projects, hosted on platforms like GitHub and Vercel, demonstrate my ability to translate technical concepts into functional and user-friendly web applications.
resume.place2: Online Courses, YouTube Tutorials, and Documentation
resume.resume2desc: I dedicated myself to self-directed study, focusing on web development through online courses, YouTube tutorials, and in-depth documentation. I gained a strong foundation in web development technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js.
resume.resume3desc: I graduated with a focus on Mathematics, developing strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
resume.place4: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv, Ukraine
resume.resume4desc: I pursued a Studienkolleg program, preparing me for university studies in Germany.
resume.resume5desc: I began my studies in Civil Engineering at Lviv Polytechnic National University, Ukraine.
resume.resume6desc: I successfully completed a B2 German language course, enhancing my language proficiency and communication skills.
